title: ICMPv6 Echo packet builder + gateway SCHC round-trip test
description: Add lichen_core::icmpv6 with echo_request/echo_reply builders (no_std). Add a gateway test that builds an ICMPv6 Echo Request, SCHC-compresses it (rule 2), decompresses it, and verifies the result matches the original — proving the full link-local ping path works without needing TUN or root.
